title: The walk-by: drive past the house you want
subtitle: A physical activity for making the house you want to own feel real rather than imaginary.
excerpt: An activity from Day 25 of the MONEY program. Go to the street. Look at the building. Let the goal be something you can see through a windscreen.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 25 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: An activity from Day 25 of the MONEY program. The principle is simple: goals that live entirely in your head stay abstract. Goals you can see from the street become concrete. The exercise takes as long as it takes to drive or walk to the area where you want to own property and back.
Identify the area or the specific street where you would buy if you could. If you have a Rightmove or Zoopla shortlist, pick one property from it.
Drive past it or walk past it. Look at it properly, the front door, the windows, the garden if there is one.
Stay calm. You are not daydreaming. You are looking at a real building on a real street.
Notice what comes up in your body. Write one sentence about it when you get home.
You don't need to picture yourself living there during the visit. Looking is enough.
Adapted from Day 25 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
